name: @fora/tenancy-lint
description: FORA tenancy lint — fails the build on ad-hoc DDL outside `migrations/`, on `BYPASSRLS` outside `migrations/` and `audit/`, and warns on multi-tenant tables without an `ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY` + `tenant_isolation` policy. See FORA-124 acceptance bar #5 and FORA-165 (0.7.2d).
